description_long: This is a compact, upright electric radiator with a cylindrical core and a sturdy, flat base. The main body is constructed from dark, likely powder-coated metal, with a central heating element visible through a vertical grille on the front. The base is wide and circular, providing stability and preventing tipping, and the radiator's design is minimalistic with subtle branding and control markings on the side. The front grille consists of evenly spaced vertical bars, allowing heat to radiate outward efficiently. The sides are solid, with one side featuring a small control panel or indicator area. The overall appearance is modern and functional, suitable for urban indoor or semi-outdoor environments.
description: A compact, upright electric radiator with a cylindrical core, vertical grille, and wide circular base, finished in dark metal. Modern, minimalistic design with visible heating element and subtle side controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical grille and central heating element, with the wide circular base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid side panel and a small control or indicator area, with the base's circular outline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the radiator, which is mostly solid with some vertical structure, and the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing branding or labeling and the solid side panel, with the base visible.
attribute_pipe_connections: none visible; likely electric with no external pipe connections
